themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "And he built fenced cities in Judah: for the land had rest, and he had no war in those years;...".
